title: AURORA License, 61354, Zog Green Dragon, 6In, Soft Toy
features: Zog’s Story is from writer Julia Donaldson and illustrator Axel Scheffler,
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: Joining Zog, the young, warm-hearted Dragon on his quest to learn the Dragon trade, is his friend from class Green Dragon. Both are from the award-winning writer Julia Donaldson creator of The Gruffalo with illustrator Axel Scheffler. First published in 2010, the story of this trademark character is loved by millions and has been made into an animation story. Collect Zog as well as his other classmates. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
